overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban street at sunset. The player moves under massive concrete overpasses toward a towering neon-lit building with Japanese signage, passing sparse pedestrians and light vehicle traffic in a high-tech dystopian cityscape.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shaded sidewalk beneath massive concrete overpass pillars

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway above
low-rise industrial structure with orange facade under the overpass
tall futuristic skyscraper covered in digital billboards and pink neon signage with Japanese characters
multi-story parking structure with horizontal ventilation slats on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive highway overpass in a cyberpunk city. Concrete pillars line the left side while a parking garage stands on the right. In the distance ahead, a towering building covered in bright pink neon signage dominates the skyline. Sparse pedestrians walk along the shaded sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath highway interchange looking up at infrastructure

events.description: camera turns left and tilts upward to view the underside of the highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the massive concrete infrastructure above

entered.detail: underside of the massive highway overpass viewed from below showing concrete texture and support beams

segments.scene_description: The camera abruptly turns left and tilts upward to examine the massive concrete highway infrastructure from below. The perspective emphasizes the scale of the overpass deck and pillars. The neon tower remains visible in the peripheral right background while the surrounding buildings fall out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching neon-lit commercial district

events.description: camera returns to forward facing position and continues walking toward the neon tower
passing orange and white construction barriers and trash containers on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking briskly toward the neon-lit district, passing other pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: brown sedan driving along the street in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: orange and white striped plastic barriers blocking off a section of the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street near the highway ramp
curving elevated highway ramp structure silhouetted against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to its forward trajectory and continues walking toward the glowing neon tower. The environment opens up with palm trees visible on the left and construction barriers on the right. The setting sun creates a warm golden light that contrasts with the artificial neon glow of the distant building.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with crosswalk beneath elevated highway

events.description: ego steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street toward the intersection
camera turns left to face the setting sun beneath the highway ramp structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the surrounding traffic and architecture

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crosswalk with white striped markings across the multi-lane road
traffic signal showing green light mounted on a pole at the corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing a wide urban intersection as the sun sets in the background. The crosswalk markings pass beneath the camera as vehicles drive through the intersection. The camera then turns left to face the massive elevated highway ramp silhouetted against the golden sunset, with the neon tower now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadows of a concrete overpass toward a vibrant, neon-lit urban horizon at sunset. It begins by walking beneath a massive highway structure flanked by concrete pillars and a parking garage, with a towering pink neon building dominating the distant skyline. The camera then abruptly pivots left and tilts upward to emphasize the scale of the overhead infrastructure before returning to its forward path. As the environment opens up, the scene shifts from shaded concrete to a sun-drenched street lined with palm trees and construction barriers, where warm golden light begins to contrast with the artificial neon glow. Finally, the camera crosses a wide urban intersection with passing vehicles before turning left to face the silhouette of an elevated highway ramp against the setting sun.
